section.heading: Members of Space Force: credit for service for purposes of laws providing pay and benefits for members, dependents, and survivors
section.chapeau: For the purposes of laws providing pay and benefits for members of the armed forces and their dependents and beneficiaries:

paragraph.content: Military training, duty, or other service performed by a member of the Space Force in a space force active status not on sustained duty shall be considered military training, duty, or other service, as the case may be, as a member of a reserve component.
Sustained duty performed by a member of the Space Force under section 20105 of this title shall be considered active duty as a member of a regular component.
Active duty performed by a member of the Space Force in a space force active status not on sustained duty shall be considered active duty as a member of a reserve component.
Inactive-duty training performed by a member of the Space Force shall be considered inactive-duty training as a member of a reserve component.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 118–31, div. A, title XVII, § 1715, Dec. 22, 2023, 137 Stat. 631.)
